name: lms-pdf-downloader
description: Automatically download PDF course materials from Miva LMS.
author: David Peluola

scripts.electron:dev: cross-env ELECTRON_DEV=1 concurrently -k "npm run dev" "wait-on -t 120000 http://127.0.0.1:3000 && cross-env ELECTRON_DEV=1 electron ."
scripts.electron:start: npm run build && node scripts/copy-standalone-assets.cjs && electron .
scripts.dist: npm run build && node scripts/copy-standalone-assets.cjs && node scripts/prepare-playwright-browsers.cjs && npm run icons:electron && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder
scripts.dist:dir: npm run build && node scripts/copy-standalone-assets.cjs && node scripts/prepare-playwright-browsers.cjs && npm run icons:electron && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --dir
